task: Open the page with an overview of the submission of releases on Discogs.
final_result_response:
The page has been successfully opened! The browser is now displaying the **"Overview Of Submission Guidelines For Releases"** page on the Discogs support site at:

📄 **https://support.discogs.com/hc/en-us/articles/360004016474-Overview-Of-Submission-Guidelines-For-Releases**

This page provides a comprehensive overview of the submission guidelines for releases on Discogs, including rules and links covering topics such as Artists, Titles, Labels, Formats, and more — everything needed to contribute releases to the Discogs database.

Successfully navigated to the Discogs release submission overview page. The page "Overview Of Submission Guidelines For Releases" is now open at: https://support.discogs.com/hc/en-us/articles/360004016474-Overview-Of-Submission-Guidelines-For-Releases

This page provides a full overview of the submission guidelines for releases on Discogs, including rules for Artists, Titles, Labels, Formats, and more.

judge.reasoning:
**Task Understanding:** The user asked the agent to open the page that provides an overview of the submission of releases on Discogs. A successful completion means the agent navigated to and opened the correct Discogs page covering release submission guidelines/overview.

**Output Assessment:** The agent navigated to the Discogs homepage, tried a few paths (including one that 404'd), then found and clicked the "Submission Guidelines" link, landing on https://support.discogs.com/hc/en-us/articles/360004016474-Overview-Of-Submission-Guidelines-For-Releases — the "Overview Of Submission Guidelines For Releases" page on the Discogs support site.

**Evidence:** Step 8 (browser_analyze_state) confirmed the agent was on the correct page: "Yes, this is the Overview Of Submission Guidelines For Releases page on the Discogs support site." The page URL matches the expected Discogs submission guidelines overview article. The execution integrity status is "healthy" with no browser errors. The agent recovered from a 404 intermediate step and reached the correct destination.

**Summary:** The agent successfully opened the correct Discogs page — the "Overview Of Submission Guidelines For Releases" support article — as confirmed by step 8's analysis of the final page state and the URL https://support.discogs.com/hc/en-us/articles/360004016474-Overview-Of-Submission-Guidelines-For-Releases.
